title: Syracuse approves funding for youth alternative to incarceration program
summary: The Syracuse Common Council approved funding for the Exalt Youth program, a criminal justice alternative that provides internships and professional opportunities for youth involved in the justice system. The pilot program, modeled on a NYC initiative, is supported by a New York State Division of Criminal Justice Services grant and has generated positive sentiment from city leadership including Common Councilor Chol Majok.

entity_refs.name: New York State Division of Criminal Justice Services

political_signal.description: Council approval and grant funding signal executive and state commitment to youth criminal justice alternatives as a policy priority.
